Not sure why 40k follow my random thoughts here on Twitter (fine X), but thank you to each one of you.. I tend to randomly oscillate between long form writing, shower thoughts on tech, community building & snippets of family life. If you are expecting only one, there are plenty of significantly better accounts. Some of my closest personal and professional friendships have originated because of X. A lot of them through cold DMs. I wouldn’t be professionally where I am without this platform tbh. No matter how many wild changes “sink in” over the years, this platform continues to embody the word anti fragile.

马斯克买下“一束光”，硅谷巨头们也坐不住了
abstract: 马斯克完成对光通信初创公司Mesh的收购后，硅谷巨头纷纷加速光模块赛道布局：Marvell巨资收购Celestial AI，英伟达战略投资Lumentum等并入股Ayar Labs，博通推出Tomahawk 6。各大巨头还联合成立OCI MSA组织，以统一光学计算互连开放规范。

headline: “玻璃桥”冲击到底有多大？华尔街：FAU厂商面临颠覆压力，AI光模块企业暂时相对安全
abstract: 华尔街认为康宁GlassBridge技术近期冲击有限，1-2年内不影响已定型的CPO方案；但长期来看，该技术在2028至2030年商业化时，将对传统FAU厂商带来颠覆性的替代压力。部分AI光模块企业和已转型有源光引擎的公司风险相对可控。
